zh.Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Engla: 英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛
zh.Stockerston, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾斯托可斯東
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Sothill於大約1472年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親John Sothill18歲，母親Elizabeth Plumpton18歲。他於1502年4月7日與Joan Empson結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1506年5月16日之前在英國萊希斯特斯爾斯托可斯東，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Engla: 英国萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛
zh-hans.Stockerston, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾斯托可斯東
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Sothill于大约1472年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，他的父亲John Sothill18岁，母亲Elizabeth Plumpton18岁。他于1502年4月7日与Joan Empson结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1506年5月16日之前在英国萊希斯特斯爾斯托可斯東，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Sothill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Toothill
meanings: English: (i) locative name from various places named with Old English * tōt-hyll ‘lookout hill’, primarily Toothill in Rastrick (WR Yorks) and perhaps Tootle in Longridge (Lancs), but also Tuttle Hill in Nuneaton (Warwicks), and Tothill (Lincs). There are several further minor place-names of this type that may have contributed to the surname. (ii) locative name, occasionally from Tottenhill (Norfolk), recorded as Totehill in 1251.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Sothill was born about 1472, in Leicestershire, England, his father, John Sothill, was 18 and his mother, Elizabeth Plumpton, was 18. He married Joan Empson on 7 April 1502. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died before 16 May 1506, in Stockerston, Leicestershire, England, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Sothill est né environ 1472, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Sothill, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Plumpton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Joan Empson le 7 avril 1502. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 16 mai 1506, à Stockerston, Leicestershire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Sothill um 1472 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Sothill 18 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Plumpton 18. Er hat am 7. April 1502 Joan Empson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 16. Mai 1506 in Stockerston, Leicestershire, England und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Sothill è nato il circa 1472 nel Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, John Sothill, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Plumpton, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Joan Empson il 7 aprile 1502. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 16 maggio 1506, nel Stockerston, Leicestershire, England, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイア

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Sothillが約1472年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Sothillは18歳，母Elizabeth Plumptonは18歳であった。1502年4月7日にJoan Empsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1506年5月16日以前にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアストッカーストンで死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Sothill(이)가 대략 1472년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sothill(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Plumpton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1502년 4월 7일 Joan Empson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1506년 5월 16일 이전 영국 레이스스터실르 스톡르스턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1472–Bef 16 May 1506: ойролцоогоор 1472 он–1506 оны Тавдугаар сарын 16–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Sothill nasceu aproximadamente 1472, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Sothill, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Plumpton, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Empson em 7 de abril de 1502. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 16 de maio de 1506, em Stockerston, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Sothill родился около 1472 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Sothill было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Plumpton, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Empson 7 апреля 1502 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 16 май 1506 г. в местности стоккирстон, лисестиршир, Англия и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Sothill nació aproximadamente 1472, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Sothill, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Plumpton, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Joan Empson el 7 de abril de 1502. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 16 de mayo de 1506, en Stockerston, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
